name: Cantaloupe Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cantaloupe liquid in a blender from approximately 1 1/2 cups of seeded and peeled ripe cantaloupe chunks, then heated.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients in the order listed.
3. Set the darkness control at 10 o'clock on your bread machine (or oven if using).
4. Select white bread setting and press "Start."
5. The dough will be soft and sticky. If any of it clings to the sides of the pan at the end of the first kneading, use a rubber spatula to push it down.
6. This delicious bread is based on an equally unbelievable Texas tradition, featuring peeled cantaloupe segments arranged in a sunburst pattern on a serving plate with bread cubes piled in the center and covered with cream sauce, then dusted with paprika and/or dotted with red jelly.
7. You can spread your own jelly on these slices, perhaps over a layer of whipped cream cheesecake mixed with mashed cantaloupe, to savor the full range of often tantalizing flavors.
